name: @manya/unify
description: Manya Unify — Connective tissue for the Manya ecosystem. Federates identities across tools (ORCID, DOI, ROR, IMO, container, AWB, HS code), routes events through declared sync channels, bridges vocabularies (HS↔industry, UN/LOCODE↔country, industry↔sector/domain), and dispatches capability-based calls to the tool that owns each capability. Makes 'Everything Connected. Everyone Unified.' true at runtime.
author: Uviwe Menyiwe (Azura Daemon), HAEL Foundation
